svg.text: Multus Architecture: kubelet → multus meta-CNI → delegate plugins → Pod netns
Layer 1 — Kubernetes side (apiserver state + node-local CNI invoker)
Layer 2 — Multus components on node (shim binary in /opt/cni/bin + daemon DaemonSet, talk via multus.sock)
Layer 3 — Delegate CNI plugins (real CNI binaries in /opt/cni/bin, exec'd by multus-daemon via chroot)
Layer 4 — Pod network namespace (one per Pod; NICs created by delegates, status written back via annotation)
VF moved from host into netns
Source: multus-cni v4.2.4 cmd/{multus, multus-shim, multus-daemon}, pkg/server/*
